mapper.sql: ID AS id , PARTNER_ID AS partnerId , CODE_UPPER AS codeUpper , CODE_CD AS codeCd , CODE_NM AS codeNm , DEF_CODE_VAL AS defCodeVal , CODE_DESC AS codeDesc , CODE_ETC AS codeEtc , CODE_ETC1 AS codeEtc1 , CODE_ETC2 AS codeEtc2 , CODE_ETC3 AS codeEtc3 , CODE_ORDER AS codeOrder , CRE_TM AS creTm , CRE_USER AS creUser , UPD_TM AS updTm , UPD_USER AS updUser , DEL_YN AS deleteYn
mapper.select: /* com.shop.mapper.code.selectLowerCodeByPartnerCodeUpper */ SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY ID ASC) AS no , ID , CODE_UPPER , CODE_CD , CODE_NM , COALESCE(DEF_CODE_VAL, '0') AS DEF_CODE_VAL FROM TB_PARTNER_CODE A WHERE CODE_UPPER = #{codeUpper} AND PARTNER_ID = #{partnerId} AND DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY CODE_ORDER ASC
